summary: Complete revised v3 implementation plan for Video Prompt Pipeline. Key changes in v3: (1) Sequence has no minimum duration, only max 25s, (2) Characters listed fully without max cap, each with chapters list, (3) Locations identified by LLM Step 2 directly from script instead of frequency pre-filter from Step 1, (4) Step 2 outputs 1 single checkpoint file with all 3 arrays, sent as VISUAL REFERENCE section in Step 3 prompt, (5) background_and_extras explicitly references factions[] from Step 2, (6) Validation simplified to 2 tiers: ≤10% auto-fix, >10% reject, (7) Final JSON tách rõ từng field, không có duration.
